subject: [DCAE] Update pm-mapper default vaules
commit_message:
[DCAE] Update pm-mapper default vaules

Change default pm-mapper configuration to avoid TLS error
in default installation.

Issue-ID: INT-1895
Signed-off-by: Tomasz Wrobel <tomasz.wrobel@nokia.com>
Change-Id: I20c235a86f87f01b965e14f38145d1754f65b7c2

@Fiachra, This merge change PERFORMANCE_MEASURMENT topic https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/testsuite/+/128336. Currently bulkpm doesn't work. After merge values of pm-mapper the integration test should be green 5/5
One test is disabled (config map change configuration - still use consul and will be change in feature)  
We checked it on Lab.
